narrative:
Precinct Prairie Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,104 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
